channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Score the new Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 for as little as $129.99 with this limited-time trade-in deal
item.description: Samsung has a limited-time trade-in deal available on the brand-new Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 — here's how you can save up to $250 on both wearables.

item.title: Google Maps s’apprête à piocher dans vos e-mails et vos photos : ce qui va changer
item.description: Google Maps s'apprête à passer un cap important en intégrant « l'Intelligence Personnelle » de Gemini à son service de cartographie.

item.title: Paramount+ s’inspire de TikTok pour créer des « micro-dramas » en verticales
item.description: TikTok continue d'inspirer les plateformes de SVoD. Après avoir adopté un flux de vidéos verticales, Paramount miserait désormais sur un autre format phare du réseau social : les séries courtes. Conçues pour capter l'attention, elles pourraient représenter une nouvelle forme d'engagement pour le géant du streaming.

item.title: Garmin recule déjà sur le paywall de son nouveau bracelet Cirqa et c’est pour le mieux
item.description: Garmin voulait faire payer un abonnement pour afficher votre fréquence cardiaque en direct sur son nouveau bracelet Cirqa. Devant la levée de boucliers, la marque recule déjà, avant même le lancement réel.

item.title: Why AI-powered network management is no longer optional
item.description: How widely is AI-based network monitoring used today and where is it headed next?

item.title: I love this wacky 47g sci-fi gaming mouse – and it's one of the best I've tested all year
item.description: AngryMiao's ultralight AM Infinity.97 packs a 30,000 DPI sensor, 8000Hz wireless polling and a genuinely clever swappable battery system into a sub-50g, sci-fi-styled chassis — though its basic software and premium price mean it isn't the easiest sell.

item.title: Quel casque Bluetooth choisir à la place des AirPods Max 2 ? Notre sélection des alternatives
item.description: Si c'est bien l'un des plus performants du marché, le nouveau casque Bluetooth d'Apple ne s'adresse pas à tous les publics. Vous êtes à la recherche d'autre chose ? Voici notre sélection des meilleures alternatives aux AirPods Max 2.

item.title: OpenAI's latest service wants to get your company build and get better integrated with AI agents
item.description: Once a company's deployed AI agents across the likes of customer service, OpenAI Presence steps in to keep it updated and current.

item.title: C’est chez Fnac et Darty que vous trouverez la meilleure offre pour le Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 : jusqu’à 600 € de remise
item.description: Le Galaxy Z Fold 8, tout nouveau smartphone pliant au format passeport de Samsung, est disponible à 1 399 euros au lieu de 1 999 euros chez Fnac, grâce à un code promo et une remise adhérent cumulables. Soit 600 euros d'économie sur le dernier-né de la gamme pliante, à peine quelques jours après son officialisation. La même offre est disponible chez Darty. ...

item.title: Comment désactiver les réponses par IA en France ?
item.description: Google a lancé ses réponses par IA en France. Des internautes ont trouvé la parade pour désactiver la fonction Aperçu IA et revenir aux simples résultats.

item.title: « 40 000 km par an et je ne reviendrai pas au thermique » : le verdict sans appel de nos lecteurs sur la voiture électrique
item.description: Il est bien loin le temps où vous craigniez de voyager en voiture électrique. Vous avez vos applications, vos calculs d'itinéraires, vos stratégies de recharge et vos pauses-café improvisées, donc vous réinventez vos longs trajets de trucs et astuces. Et quel bonheur ! Retour avec vos témoignages sur une révolution des usages où le voyage compte désormais autant que la destination. ...

item.title: We got two Samsung Galaxy Folds, two Watches and a Flip at Unpacked, but no Buds: here's when Samsung's mythical cuff-style open earbuds are now said to be arriving
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Buds Able (or just 'Galaxy Able') were a no-show, so when could the much-rumored open earbuds release?

item.title: Des milliers de voitures en danger : ces erreurs de sécurité auraient pu tourner au drame
item.description: Une base de données mal sécurisée appartenant à la plateforme française Globalfleet.eu a été découverte. Elle a exposé pendant plusieurs semaines 136 Go de données sensibles concernant des centaines de conducteurs. Avec celle-ci, un pirate pouvait également couper à distance le moteur ou verrouiller les portières de près de 3 600 véhicules à travers l'Europe....

item.title: Votre liste de souhaits Steam est un bazar sans nom ? Valve déploie une mise à jour miracle
item.description: Steam s'attaque enfin au fouillis de sa liste de souhaits. Catégories personnalisées, alertes de démos, partage revu : Valve muscle un outil resté basique pendant des années.

item.title: Sony's FX5 cinema camera finally offers open gate and RAW 5K recording
item.description: Sony has just unveiled its latest cinema camera that may foreshadow some long-awaited features in its consumer mirrorless lineup.

item.title: Banning Social Media for Kids Is a Bad Idea
item.description: The risks are real. But banning children from the internet could create new problems without solving the ones that really matter.

item.title: Google Turns a Selfie Video Into Your Account’s Spare Key
item.description: The next time you’re locked out of your Google account, you can use your face as part of the account recovery process.

item.title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
item.description: Google announced yet another way to gain access to your account if you get locked out, forget your password, or don't have access to the phone, computer, or two-factor authentication apps you typically use. As the name implies, selfie video lets you capture a short video of your face on a mobile device or PC, […]

item.title: Here are the 5 biggest changes coming to the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra compared to the Z Fold 7
item.description: Looking to upgrade your Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 to a Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra? Here are 5 major changes you need to know about.

item.title: The new trailer for Clayface is pure nightmare fuel — here's everything you need to know about the forthcoming body-horror comic book movie
item.description: DC Studios has unveiled a fresh trailer for its forthcoming body-horror comic book movie Clayface.

item.title: Google adds selfie video as a log-in option
item.description: You'll now be able to get into your Google account with a selfie video.

item.title: Why emotional intelligence will be an important performance metric in the future of work
item.description: A lot of businesses don’t reward emotional intelligence, but AI is going to change all of that. Many businesses discuss emotional intelligence, but in practice, this concept has remained in the background for quite some time. Sure, you see many references to it in management and leadership literature. However, employers didn’t consider it as a factor when it came to actual performance reviews and hiring decisions....

item.title: This anti-AI font was made with AI
item.description: Eric Lu uses AI to generate fonts. Now he is using fonts to trick the same technology. When a close friend of Eric Lu, a software engineer, noticed her grandmother losing motor skills, she asked her to write down her name on a piece of paper as a keepsake—maybe she could use it for a tattoo later on. But thanks to Lu and artificial intelligence, the handwriting was digitized, becoming a font for her to use in the future. ...

item.title: A Rosie Assoulin dress for $50? Target’s collab magic might be working again
item.description: The megaretailer is doubling down on its design ambitions with a slate of cool fashion collabs. This weekend, Rosie Assoulin will do something she’s hasn’t done in 14 years of running her namesake label: sell a dress for under $50. The award-winning designer—a red-carpet favorite of Rihanna, Beyoncé, and Karlie Kloss for her sculptural silhouettes and joyful, saturated colors—is collaborating with Target on a collection of dresses, matching sets, handbags, and sandals....

item.title: The amazing thing about Samsung’s new folding phones is their normalcy
item.description: After seven years of iteration, a Galaxy Z Fold is just a flagship phone that unfolds—not a weird category unto itself. Recently, when talking to Samsung Electronics America Executive VP of Mobile Experience Dave Das about the company’s new Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra phones, I offhandedly referred to the whole category of folding phones as “a novelty.” Das didn’t tell me I was wrong. But he did politely try to reframe my thinking about the new models, which Samsung unveiled on Wednesday at a Galaxy Unpacked event in London....

item.title: The sale of this monumental Frank Gehry desk proves his legacy is stronger than ever
item.description: ‘Icehenge’ reimagined the trite form of a desk into an uncontainable force of nature. It just set a new record at auction. It’s a desk so big they called it “Icehenge.”

item.title: Where OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, and other AI giants stand on regulation
item.description: From Anthropic’s $40 million political push to Meta’s campaign against state laws, the major AI players are taking sharply different approaches. Anthropic has doubled down on its position as the AI company pushing hardest for industry regulation, announcing on July 21 that it plans to donate another $20 million to Public First Action, a political group that advocates for government-imposed safeguards on AI....

item.title: Nvidia RTX Spark : ça se confirme, ASUS et MSI dégaineront avant leur rivaux taïwanais
item.description: On l'avait compris en creux, c'est désormais officiel, ASUS et MSI seront les premières marques taïwanaises à lancer des PC équipés de la puce Nvidia RTX Spark. Acer et Gigabyte ont aussi des modèles bien à eux dans les tuyaux, mais pour plus tard.

item.title: Jack Dorsey wants to take on Slack and GitHub with new Buzz platform bringing humans and agents together
item.description: Buzz is one single app for human-AI conversations, project context, code hosting and more.

item.title: Google, Amazon, Meta : le coût écologique caché de l’IA ruine le rêve « zéro carbone » des géants de la tech
item.description: Pour les géants du numérique, l’IA est devenue la suite logique de leur modèle de croissance. Une course effrénée s'est ainsi engagée pour développer les infrastructures nécessaires à cette révolution technologique, au risque de compromettre les ambitions climatiques que ces entreprises s'étaient fixées.

item.title: La Voie lactée a subi un choc d’une violence extrême : son disque aurait basculé de plus de 90° !
item.description: En mesurant il y a presque une décennie les mouvements et les positions de plus d'un milliard d'étoiles de la Voie lactée avec une précision record, la mission Gaia de l'ESA permet aux astronomes de faire de l'archéologie galactique, c'est-à-dire de reconstituer son passé à partir des...

item.title: The security standard that could prevent a costly mistake with AI in hospitality
item.description: ISO 42001, the security standard, defines how leaders must build, deploy and govern AI.

item.title: NBA 2K27 cover stars revealed — Victor Wembanyama, Caitlin Clark, and Derrick Rose
item.description: Victor Wembanyama, Caitlin Clark, and Derrick Rose are the cover stars for NBA 2K27. Here's who's on which edition, plus release date, and early access details.

item.title: My Week of Transparent Living With Apple’s ‘More Clear’ Liquid Glass Setting
item.description: I cranked Apple’s iOS 27 beta to maximum transparency on my iPhone and enjoyed every warped second.

item.title: Framework’s premium laptop is shipping with less RAM
item.description: RAMageddon has claimed yet another victim, with Framework now announcing a "major and unfortunate" pricing update for its upcoming premium laptop - which also impacts folks who preordered it. Memory configurations for the Laptop 13 Pro have been adjusted after Framework says it received cost updates from its memory supplier that "are more than double […]...

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Pitch Black Booster Display Box is at an all-time low price on Amazon — save $70
item.description: Save $70 on the Pokémon TCG Pitch Black Booster Display Box at Amazon, now $209.95 and at its lowest price yet.

item.title: Tesla bat son record de ventes, mais ses profits s’effondrent : que se passe-t-il ?
item.description: Avec 480 126 voitures électriques livrées dans le monde au 2e trimestre 2026, Tesla renoue avec le succès. Mais si la firme d’Elon Musk bat un nouveau record, sa situation reste encore très délicate avec des marges qui fondent à vue d'œil.

item.title: Forget the new foldables: The Samsung Galaxy S25+ is $300 off at Amazon
item.description: Get the best smartphone deal. Save 30% on the Samsung Galaxy S25+ at Amazon.

item.title: The Eufy Omni C20 robot vacuum is down to its lowest-ever price — save $210 at Amazon
item.description: Get the best robot vacuum deal. Save 39% on the Eufy Omni C20 at Amazon

item.title: Galaxy Watch 9 et Ultra : Samsung annonce un partenariat de taille avec Strava
item.description: Strava débarque en préinstallation sur les nouvelles montres de Samsung. Tout n'est pourtant pas nouveau dans ce rapprochement.

item.title: Remember Jibo? Its Successor Is a Wearable That Turns Your Life Into AI Slop
item.description: With “blessings” from the original Jibo founders, iKairos is a wearable or desk-mounted “AI journal” that turns your family moments into AI images and video.

item.title: On a trouvé le tracker Bluetooth ultime : compatible iOS et Android, il est à -20 % sur Amazon
item.description: L'Ugreen FineTrack Slim Duo est un tracker Bluetooth au format carte, compatible à la fois avec iOS et Android. En ce moment, il est disponible pour 23,99 euros au lieu de 29,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Forfait mobile : Orange et SFR lancent des outils pour aider les voyageurs lors de leur séjour à l’étranger
item.description: Orange et SFR ont travaillé avec le ministère des Affaires étrangères afin de pouvoir venir en aide aux voyageurs en cas de besoin. Désormais, dans les SMS de bienvenue reçus à l'étranger, un lien permet d'accéder aux conseils et aux alertes du ministère en cas de crise.

item.title: L’Europe donne son feu vert pour que Paramount croque Warner Bros
item.description: Paramount a accepté la concession exigée par la Comission européenne. La société gagne ainsi le feu vert pour racheter Warner Bros.

item.title: Save $70 on Beats Solo 4 headphones with this limited-time Amazon deal
item.description: Get the best deal on headphones. Save 35% on the Beats Solo 4 at Amazon.

item.title: The Fire TV Stick 4K Select is a cheap way to upgrade your streaming, now on sale for $21.99
item.description: Get the best Fire Stick deal at Amazon. Save 45% on the Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select at Amazon.

item.title: MANGOS is not the endgame. It is the beginning
item.description: Forget simple AI upgrades. MANGOS is just the foundation for a total company redesign.

item.title: Geopolitical interference takes center stage during the World Cup
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is the largest sporting event ever staged. This makes for an unprecedented attack surface for threat actors.

item.title: Moins de 38 000 €, 649 km d’autonomie : Audi pulvérise un record avec sa nouvelle petite électrique
item.description: La nouvelle Audi A2 e-tron finalise sa mise au point. Si les prototypes circulent encore sous déguisement, leur autonomie a été rendue publique. L’allemande pourra ainsi parcourir jusqu’à 649 km avec une charge. Un record sur le segment.

item.title: Un mini PC à la place d’un laptop pour travailler : la bonne idée quand le prix des composants flambe [Sponso]
item.description: Inutile d'avoir une grosse tour de gamer ou un PC portable à plusieurs milliers d'euros pour la plupart des usages bureautiques du quotidien. Les mini PC, disponibles à tous les niveaux de prix chez PcComponentes, sont d'excellentes alternatives.

item.title: ‘The Child Is Terrified’: Measles Doctors Speak Out
item.description: Hear from six pediatricians in measles hot spot Utah, as the US faces infection levels not seen in over three decades and prepares to lose its status as a country that eliminated the dangerous disease.

item.title: Everyone hates massive data centers. This $18 billion CEO has a better way to get you the AI compute you need
item.description: Akamai CEO Tom Leighton shares his contrarian vision for building a faster (and cheaper) kind of AI infrastructure. And he’s got Nvidia on his side. For the past few years, the AI infrastructure race has been driven by the assumption that larger artificial intelligence models require larger data centers. That idea has fueled an extraordinary wave of spending....

item.title: Astronomers think some asteroids have been comets all along. Heres why.
item.description: A mysterious near-Earth object once thought to be an asteroid turns out to be a dark comet, challenging notions about space rocks.

item.title: Hisense’s new PX4 Pro projector turns your living room into a giant movie theater — buy it for under $4,000
item.description: Hisense’s PX4 Pro 4K triple laser UST projector delivers up to a 200-inch screen, Dolby Vision, Dolby Atmos, and gaming features for $3,997.97.

item.title: The AI writing tool built specifically for book creation is on sale for just $33
item.description: Get Youbooks AI Lifetime for $32.97 through July 26 and create professional non-fiction books with AI-powered research and writing tools.

item.title: Whats new to streaming this week? (July 24, 2026)
item.description: What’s new to streaming for the week of July 24, 2026, on Netflix, Prime Video, Hulu, and more? We've got you covered.

item.title: New Costco Gold Star Members can receive a $50 Digital Costco Shop Card
item.description: Join Costco Gold Star Membership for $65 and receive a $50 Digital Costco Shop Card* through a limited-time 50th anniversary promotion.

item.title: Why burnt-out millennials are turning to slow dating apps in 2026
item.description: Swipe fatigue is real, especially for millennial daters, but these apps are capitalizing on the trend toward "slow dating."

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 for free — how to claim yours
item.description: How to get the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8. Get the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 when you trade in an eligible device on an Experience Beyond plan with T-Mobile.

item.title: OpenAI agent went rogue, escaped, and hacked Hugging Face
item.description: OpenAI built a hacking bot and put it in a box. The bot escaped and hacked everything in its path to prove it is the best hacking bot.

item.title: Garmin just launched the screen-free Cirqa Smart Band, and it looks a lot like Whoop
item.description: Garmin just launched the screen-free Cirqa Smart Band. It looks like the Whoop, but no subscription is required.

item.title: Open earbuds guide: What they are, who should buy them, and why theyre popping up everywhere
item.description: Most consumer audio brands are including open earbuds in their lineup, so our headphone expert explained what they are, who they're for, and which open earbuds are our favorites.

item.title: The simple way to get other people to prioritize your work
item.description: The art and science of ‘leading across.’ Someone in another department Slacks you: “Hey, quick favor . . . any chance you could get this to me by Friday?” No context on why it matters, no acknowledgment of what’s already on your plate, just an ask. You’ve probably sent a version of that message yourself, and you’ve almost certainly seen your own request sliding to the bottom of someone else’s list, with nothing you could structurally do about it....

item.title: WhatsApp présente 3 nouveautés bien pratiques pour Android Auto, iPad et la version web
item.description: Meta présente des nouveautés bien pratiques pour WhatsApp, sur Android Auto et iPad notamment. On fait le point.

item.title: How to preorder Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Flip 8: See preorder offers
item.description: Samsung released three new smartphone models at Galaxy Unpacked: the Galaxy Z Flip 8, Z Fold 8, and Z Fold 8 Ultra.
